description_long: This is a rounded ceramic vase with a wide body and a slightly narrowed neck, featuring a smooth, glossy white base. Around the upper portion, two distinct horizontal bands—one black and one copper—encircle the vase, adding a modern touch. The main body is adorned with abstract, sketch-like illustrations in various colors, including green, blue, yellow, and pink, depicting loosely drawn human figures and geometric shapes. The artwork appears hand-drawn, giving the vase a playful, artistic character reminiscent of urban street art or contemporary gallery pieces. The rim is unadorned and slightly flared, with a soft beige tone. The overall impression is of a decorative, modern vase suitable for display in stylish urban environments.
description: A glossy, white ceramic vase with black and copper bands and colorful, abstract sketch art of figures and shapes on its body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vase's wide body, black and copper bands, and a prominent sketch of a seated figure with green and yellow highlights.
description_view_1: This side reveals a large blue rectangular shape and more abstract figures, with the bands clearly visible at the top.
description_view_2: This angle displays a pinkish shape and less detailed sketch lines, with the bands still visible but less artwork detail.
description_view_3: This view highlights a figure with a turquoise head and pink body, along with green circular motifs and the colored bands.
attribute_location: urban gallery or modern living room
attribute_pattern: abstract figurative sketches and geometric shapes
